processing.text: declare @q nvarchar(4000), @duplicate nvarchar(512), @locked nvarchar(512), @field varchar(32), @wsID varchar(8), @voucherID varchar(8) declare @master varchar(16), @detail varchar(16), @inquiry varchar(16), @general varchar(16), @baseCurrency varchar(8), @id char(13), @datetime0 char(21), @d0 datetime declare @user int, @admin bit, @r int, @i int, @m int, @y int, @max1 int, @max2 int, @currentID int, @count int, @roundPrice int, @roundAmount int select @d0 = getdate(), @datetime0 = convert(char(8), @d0, 112) + ' ' + convert(char(12), @d0, 114), @status = left(replace(@status, '''', '') , 1) select @i = 1, @admin = @@admin, @user = @@userID, @master = 'm&Detail;$', @detail = 'd&Detail;$', @inquiry = 'i&Detail;$', @general = 'c&Detail;$000000', @voucherID = '&Code;' select @locked = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Đã khóa số liệu, kiểm tra lại ngày chứng từ tại dòng %s.' else N'Data is locked, please check the date of voucher at row %s.' end select @duplicate = case when @@language = 'v' then N'&s1; đã tồn tại.' else '&s2; already exists.' end select @wsID = rtrim(val) from options where rtrim(name) = 'm_ws_id' select @baseCurrency = rtrim(val) from options where rtrim(name) = 'm_ma_nt0' select @roundPrice = cast(rtrim(val) as int) from options where rtrim(name) = 'm_round_gia' select @roundAmount = cast(rtrim(val) as int) from options where rtrim(name) = 'm_round_tien' select @max1 = character_maximum_length from information_schema.columns where table_name = @master + '000000' and column_name = 'so_ct' select @max2 = character_maximum_length from information_schema.columns where table_name = @detail + '000000' and column_name = 'so_ct' -- Checking update @@table set so_ct = space(@max1 - len(rtrim(ltrim(so_ct)))) + rtrim(ltrim(so_ct)) select @r = min(stt) from @@table a join c&Detail;$000000 b on rtrim(ltrim(a.so_ct)) = rtrim(ltrim(b.so_ct)) if @r is not null begin select N'số đơn hàng ' + so_ct + N' đã có. Không thể import dữ liệu.' as message from @@table return end -- Update update @@table set dvt = case when a.dvt <> '' then a.dvt else b.dvt end, ma_nt = case when a.ma_nt <> '' then a.ma_nt else @baseCurrency end from @@table a left join dmvt b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt create table #unit(ngay_ct smalldatetime, so_ct char(12)) insert into #unit select a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct from @@table a group by a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct -- Locked Date select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, dmstt b where (a.ngay_ct < b.ngay_gh1) or (a.ngay_ct > b.ngay_gh2) or (a.ngay_ct <= b.ngay_ks)&LockedDate; select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, dmctks b where b.user_id = @user and b.ma_ct = @voucherID and a.ngay_ct <= b.ngay_ks&LockedDate; select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, sysdaterules b where b.user_id = @user and ((b.ngay_ct1 is not null and a.ngay_ct < b.ngay_ct1) or (b.ngay_ct2 is not null and a.ngay_ct > b.ngay_ct2))&LockedDate; -- Check code select @field = 'ma_dvcs', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_dvcs not in (select ma_dvcs from dmdvcs)&Error; select @field = 'ma_kh', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_kh not in (select ma_kh from dmkh)&Error; select @field = 'ma_nvbh', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_nvbh<>'' and ma_nvbh not in (select ma_nvbh from dmnvbh)&Error; select @field = 'ma_nt', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_nt not in (select ma_nt from dmnt)&Error; select @field = 'ma_vt', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_vt not in (select ma_vt from dmvt)&Error; select @field = 'dvt', @r = min(stt) from @@table where dvt <>'' and dvt not in (select dvt from dmdvt)&Error; select @field = 'ma_kho', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_kho<>'' and ma_kho not in (select ma_kho from dmkho)&Error; select @field = 'ma_bp', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_bp<>'' and ma_bp not in (select ma_bp from dmbp)&Error; -- Gather create table #id(stt_rec char(13), ngay_ct smalldatetime, so_ct char(12), stt int, id int identity(1, 1)) insert into #id(ngay_ct, so_ct, stt) select ngay_ct, so_ct, min(stt) from @@table group by ngay_ct, so_ct select @count = count(*) from #id select @currentID = stt_rec from dmstt update dmstt set stt_rec = stt_rec + @count update #id set stt_rec = @wsID + replace(str(id + rtrim(@currentID) , 9), ' ', '0') + @voucherID select top 0 a.stt_rec, a.stt_rec0, a.line_nbr, a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.ma_vt, a.ma_kho, a.dvt, b.nhieu_dvt, a.he_so, a.so_luong, a.gia_nt, a.gia, a.tien_nt, a.tien, a.thue_suat, a.thue, a.thue_nt, a.gia_nt2, a.gia2, a.tien2, tien_nt2, ngay_giao, ma_bp into #d&Detail; from d&Detail;$000000 a, dmvt b insert into #d&Detail; select b.stt_rec, replace(str((a.stt - b.stt) + 1, 3), ' ', '0'), (a.stt - b.stt) + 1, a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.ma_vt, a.ma_kho, a.dvt, c.nhieu_dvt, 1, a.so_luong, 0, 0, 0, 0, a.thue_suat, round(a.thue_nt * a.ty_gia, @roundAmount), a.thue_nt, a.gia_nt2, round(a.gia_nt2 * a.ty_gia, @roundPrice), a.tien_nt2, round(a.tien_nt2 * a.ty_gia, @roundAmount),a.ngay_giao, a.ma_bp from @@table a join #id b on a.ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = b.so_ct left join dmvt c on a.ma_vt = c.ma_vt order by a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.ma_kh, a.stt update #d&Detail; set he_so = b.he_so from #d&Detail; a join vdmvtqddvt b on (a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt or b.ma_vt = '*') and a.dvt = b.dvt where a.nhieu_dvt = 1 select top 0 stt_rec, status, ma_dvcs, ma_nk, ngay_ct, so_ct, loai_ct, ma_kh, ma_gd, dien_giai, ma_nt, ty_gia, t_so_luong, t_tien_nt2, t_tien2, t_thue_nt, t_thue, t_tt_nt, t_tt, ma_nvbh, dia_diem_giao into #m&Detail; from m&Detail;$000000 insert into #m&Detail; select b.stt_rec, @status, a.ma_dvcs, '', a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, '', a.ma_kh, '', a.dien_giai, a.ma_nt, a.ty_gia, d.t_so_luong, d.t_tien_nt2, d.t_tien2, d.t_thue_nt, d.t_thue, 0, 0, a.ma_nvbh, a.dia_diem_giao from @@table a join #id b on a.stt = b.stt join #unit c on a.ngay_ct = c.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = c.so_ct join (select stt_rec, sum(so_luong) as t_so_luong, sum(tien_nt2) as t_tien_nt2, sum(tien2) as t_tien2, sum(thue_nt) as t_thue_nt, sum(thue) as t_thue from #d&Detail; group by stt_rec) d on b.stt_rec = d.stt_rec update #m&Detail; set t_tt_nt = t_tien_nt2 + t_thue_nt, t_tt = t_tien2 + t_thue create table #i&Detail;(stt_rec char(13), ngay_ct smalldatetime, so_ct char(12), ma_dvcs char(8), status char(1), user_id0 int, c$ varchar(8000), m$ varchar(8000), d$ varchar(8000), id int identity(1, 1)) insert into #i&Detail; select stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_dvcs, @status, @user, convert(varchar(12), ngay_ct, 112) + so_ct + stt_rec, '#10$' + rtrim(ma_nvbh) + '#20$' + rtrim(ma_kh) + '#30$' + rtrim(ma_nt), '' from #m&Detail; declare @v10 varchar(8000), @v20 varchar(8000), @v30 varchar(8000), @v40 varchar(8000), @v50 varchar(8000) while @count >= @i begin select @id = stt_rec from #i&Detail; where id = @i select @v10 = '', @v20 = '', @v30 = '', @v40 = '', @v50 = '' select @v10 = @v10 + '#10$' + rtrim(a.ma_kho) from (select distinct ma_kho from #d&Detail; where stt_rec = @id) a select @v20 = @v20 + '#20$' + rtrim(a.ma_vt) from (select distinct ma_vt from #d&Detail; where stt_rec = @id) a update #i&Detail; set d$ = isnull(@v10, '') + isnull(@v20, '') where stt_rec = @id select @i = @i + 1 end -- Insert declare @p varchar(32), @masterFields varchar(8000), @detailFields varchar(8000), @masterTable varchar(32), @detailTable varchar(32), @inquiryTable varchar(32) select @masterFields = 'stt_rec, ma_dvcs, ma_ct, ma_nk, loai_ct, so_lo, ngay_lo, ma_gd, ngay_lct, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_nt, ty_gia, ong_ba, ma_kh, ma_nvbh, dia_diem_giao, dien_giai, t_so_luong, t_tien_nt2, t_tien2, t_thue_nt, t_thue, t_tt_nt, t_tt,' select @masterFields = @masterFields + 'status, datetime0, datetime2, user_id0, user_id2' select @detailFields = 'stt_rec, stt_rec0, ma_ct, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_vt, ngay_giao, ' select @detailFields = @detailFields + 'dvt, he_so, ma_kho, ma_bp, ma_hd, ' select @detailFields = @detailFields + 'so_luong, gia_nt, gia, tien_nt, tien, gia_nt2, gia2, tien_nt2, tien2, line_nbr, ' select @detailFields = @detailFields + 'ma_td1, ma_td2, ma_td3, sl_td1, sl_td2, sl_td3, ngay_td1, ngay_td2, ngay_td3, gc_td1, gc_td2, gc_td3, s1, s2, s3, s4, s5, s6, s7, s8, s9' select distinct month(ngay_ct) as m, year(ngay_ct) as y into #k from #id select @r = min(y * 12 + m) from #k while @r is not null begin select @m = m, @y = y from #k where y * 12 + m = @r select @p = rtrim(@y) + replace(str(@m, 2), ' ', '0') select @masterTable = @master + @p, @detailTable = @detail + @p, @inquiryTable = @inquiry + @p select @q = 'insert into ' + @masterTable + '(' + @masterFields + ')' + ' select stt_rec, ma_dvcs, ''' + @voucherID + ''', ma_nk, loai_ct, '''', null, ma_gd,' select @q = @q + 'ngay_ct, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_nt, ty_gia, '''', ma_kh, ma_nvbh, dia_diem_giao, dien_giai, t_so_luong, t_tien_nt2, t_tien2, t_thue_nt, t_thue, t_tt_nt, t_tt, ' select @q = @q + ' ''' + @status + ''', getdate(), getdate(), ' + rtrim(@user) + ',' + rtrim(@user) select @q = @q + ' from #m&Detail; where month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) exec sp_executesql @q select @q = 'insert into ' + @detailTable + '(' + @detailFields + ')' + ' select stt_rec, stt_rec0, ''' + @voucherID + ''', ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_vt, ngay_giao, ' select @q = @q + 'dvt, he_so, ma_kho, ma_bp, '''', so_luong, 0, 0, 0, 0, gia_nt2, gia2, tien_nt2, tien2,' select @q = @q + 'line_nbr, '''', '''', '''', 0, 0, 0, null, null, null, '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', 0, 0, 0, null, null, null' select @q = @q + ' from #d&Detail; where month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) exec sp_executesql @q select @q = 'insert into ' + @inquiryTable + ' select stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_dvcs, status, user_id0, c$, m$, d$' select @q = @q + ' from #i&Detail; where month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) exec sp_executesql @q select @q = 'insert into c64$000000 select a.stt_rec, a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.ma_dvcs, a.status, a.user_id0, '''','''' ' select @q = @q + ' from #i&Detail; a where month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) exec sp_executesql @q select @r = min(y * 12 + m) from #k where y * 12 + m > @r end update c64$000000 set dien_giai = b.dien_giai, ma_kh=b.ma_kh from c64$000000 a left join #m&Detail; b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec where a.stt_rec in (select stt_rec from #m&Detail;) -- lay vao dmhd insert into dmhd(ma_hd, ten_hd, ten_hd2,ma_kh,ma_nvbh,loai_hd,ngay_hd,so_hd,hd_sd_pslk,ma_nt,tien,tien_nt, status, datetime0, datetime2,user_id0, user_id2) select rtrim(ltrim(so_ct)), dien_giai, '', ma_kh, ma_nvbh, '1', ngay_ct,rtrim(ltrim(so_ct)), 1,ma_nt, t_tt, t_tt_nt,'1', getdate(), getdate(), @@userID, @@userID from #m&Detail; where rtrim(ltrim(so_ct)) not in (select ma_hd from dmhd)
